title: Arctohyalopoa jurtzevii
taxonomy: Arctohyalopoa jurtzevii is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the arctic and alpine regions of Asia and North America. This species is closely related to other grasses within the subfamily Pooideae. Arctohyalopoa jurtzevii is further classified into the tribe Pooideae, which contains over 1,500 species of grasses. Its classification within the broader plant kingdom is also influenced by its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic studies.
uses: Arctohyalopoa jurtzevii is a species of grass in the genus Arctohyalopoa, but limited information is available regarding its medicinal uses. It is a rare and poorly studied species.
